name: TrendPilot AI - Public Community Trend Monitor Pseudo Workflow
description: A license-safe pseudo workflow for monitoring public community discussions, extracting repeated pain points, summarizing buyer language, and generating product opportunity notes.
important_notice: This is not a real n8n export file.
This file is a pseudo workflow design for planning and educational purposes.
It should not be imported directly into n8n.
TrendPilot AI does not copy or redistribute third-party workflow exports.
This workflow should only use public community pages and legally accessible information.
safe_use_principles: Do not collect private user data.
Do not scrape private groups, private messages, or login-protected content.
Do not collect usernames, emails, phone numbers, addresses, or personal profiles.
Summarize patterns instead of copying user comments.
Do not use communities for unsolicited promotion.
Respect community rules and platform terms.
Use human review before publishing or monetizing insights.

recommended_stack.public_data_collection: RSS feeds, public APIs, search APIs, Firecrawl, or manual source lists
recommended_stack.ai_analysis: Dify, OpenAI-compatible API, local LLM, or other LLM workflow
recommended_stack.data_storage: Google Sheets, Notion, Airtable, CSV, or database
recommended_stack.report_format: Markdown, Google Sheets, Notion, Telegram digest, email, or PDF
recommended_stack.human_review: Manual review step before publishing or monetization

workflow_summary.goal: Monitor public community discussions for repeated consumer problems, product complaints, buying questions, and niche language.
workflow_summary.input: Public community source list and public discussion signals.
workflow_summary.output: Pain point summaries, buyer language notes, product opportunity ideas, content angles, and risk notes.

pseudo_nodes.name: Schedule Trigger
pseudo_nodes.purpose: Start the public community trend monitoring workflow on a fixed schedule.
risk_notes: Avoid excessive automated collection.
Respect platform rules and rate limits.

pseudo_nodes.name: Load Public Community Source List
pseudo_nodes.purpose: Load a curated list of public communities, topics, or discussion pages to review.
risk_notes: Do not include private groups.
Do not include login-protected discussions.
Do not include private user profiles.
Do not include contact databases.

pseudo_nodes.name: Community Source Safety Filter
pseudo_nodes.purpose: Filter out community sources that are not safe for automated review.
checks: Does it contain private personal data?
Is automated access allowed or reasonable?
Can the content be summarized instead of copied?
Is the source relevant to product research?
risk_notes: If a source looks private or sensitive, reject it.
If the source is unclear, mark it as Needs Review.

pseudo_nodes.name: Collect Public Discussion Signals
pseudo_nodes.purpose: Collect visible discussion signals from approved public community pages.
risk_notes: Do not collect usernames.
Do not collect private user identities.
Do not copy full comments into reports.
Do not scrape private messages.
Do not use collected discussions for spam outreach.

pseudo_nodes.name: Clean and Normalize Discussion Data
pseudo_nodes.purpose: Convert collected public discussion signals into a consistent internal format.
normalization_steps: Summarize visible questions in original words.
risk_notes: Use summaries, not long quotes.
Avoid personal identifiers.
Keep source links for traceability.

pseudo_nodes.name: AI Pain Point Extraction
pseudo_nodes.purpose: Analyze public discussion signals and extract repeated consumer problems, questions, and product opportunity notes.
ai_rules: Use only provided public discussion signals.
Do not include usernames or private information.
Mark weak evidence as Low confidence.

pseudo_nodes.name: Generate Product Opportunity Notes
pseudo_nodes.purpose: Turn repeated community problems into possible product or content opportunities.
risk_notes: Community discussion signals are not proof of demand.
Product ideas need marketplace, supplier, and compliance validation.
Avoid overstating weak signals.

pseudo_nodes.name: Risk Check
pseudo_nodes.purpose: Review community-derived product ideas for compliance, privacy, claim, IP, platform, and product safety risks.

pseudo_nodes.name: Create Community Insight Record
pseudo_nodes.purpose: Merge source data, AI pain point analysis, opportunity notes, and risk review into one structured record.

output_schema.review_status: Draft | Needs Review | Approved | Rejected | Watchlist

pseudo_nodes.name: Save to Source Log
pseudo_nodes.purpose: Save community insight records to a structured reviewable log.
risk_notes: Do not store private personal data.
Do not store usernames unless absolutely necessary for citation.
Do not store scraped personal contact data.
Manage access permissions carefully.

pseudo_nodes.name: Generate Community Insight Summary
pseudo_nodes.purpose: Create a short summary of community-derived trends and pain points for human review.
risk_notes: Do not publish without human review.
Do not copy long user comments.
Do not include personal data.

pseudo_nodes.name: Human Review Gate
pseudo_nodes.purpose: Require human review before publishing, selling, or sending community-derived insights.
review_checklist: No private personal data is included.
No usernames or personal identifiers are included unless necessary and appropriate.
No long user comments are copied.
Human reviewer has checked the final summary.

pseudo_nodes.name: Send Internal Digest
pseudo_nodes.purpose: Send approved community insight summaries to an internal team or opt-in channel.
safe_delivery_rules: Send only to opt-in users or internal teams.
Do not send unsolicited mass messages.
Do not use scraped contact lists.

pseudo_nodes.name: Archive Community Insights
pseudo_nodes.purpose: Archive source records, insight summaries, and review status.
risk_notes: Do not archive private personal data.
Do not publish private internal notes accidentally.
Check sharing permissions.

recommended_data_record.trend_signal: Public discussions mention frustration with jewelry getting tangled or lost during trips.
recommended_data_record.evidence_summary: Visible public discussion patterns suggest travelers want small, organized ways to store rings, earrings, and necklaces.
recommended_data_record.target_audience: Women travelers; jewelry owners; gift buyers
recommended_data_record.pain_point: Jewelry can get tangled, scratched, or misplaced while traveling.
recommended_data_record.buyer_language: How do I pack jewelry for travel without tangling necklaces?
recommended_data_record.content_angle: Travel packing routine showing messy jewelry versus organized compact case.
recommended_data_record.risk_note: Avoid copying user comments directly. Avoid collecting usernames or personal details.
recommended_data_record.next_action: Check marketplace price range, public review complaints, and supplier options.

human_review_required_before: Creating a newsletter from community signals
Using buyer language in public marketing
what_this_workflow_should_not_do: Claim community discussion equals proven demand
disclaimer: This pseudo workflow is based on public community research concepts and AI-assisted analysis. It is for educational and planning purposes only. It does not guarantee product demand, sales, profit, or business success. Users should verify all sources, respect community rules, review platform policies, and conduct their own due diligence before making business decisions.
